text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a sudden turn of events, Umamusume from
around the world will be arriving for an
impromptu cultural exchange festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm hurriedly preparing for the occasion, when...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three... That should be enough flags.
Place the campus map directly by the entrance,
and make sure it is readily visible to the crowds!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The welcome gate is the face of the school! I
expect all of your work to be carried out with
pride.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Air Groove has such a dignified air to her...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
She's always so calm and collected, her
instructions always so clear and precise... She
amazes me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You there! Who said there wasn't work to be
done? I want you both to take care of putting up
some extra balloons.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Cultural exchange fosters the perfect
environment to learn about each other's best
qualities—as well as how to improve on them.
Keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Understood!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: There you are, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter, Scarlet? Did you run all the
way here?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, there's something I need to urgently
discuss with you. Um... Rats, it's on the tip of my
tongue!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! I wanted to ask about the
trophies for the special exhibit—the one set to be
held on the pathway to the field.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That has already been discussed by the student
council. Simply follow the list and arrange the
designated trophies.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, but the flower arrangements we ordered
for the guest's seating area also won't be
delivered in time!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That won't pose an issue. I've been growing moth
orchids at a nearby greenhouse ahead of time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
They should be just about ready. Arrange for you
and some others to bring a few pots over.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'll get to that right now!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Just one moment, Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Y-yes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove stops Daiwa Scarlet in her tracks. She
begins to comb through her hair with her fingers.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Your hair is all disheveled. That won't do.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I presume you've been cajoled into taking all
sorts of jobs, big or small.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself too hard. I'll join you later to
lend a hand.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! That means a lot to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's kind consideration appears to calm
Daiwa Scarlet down.
